# ManoVaikai.lt
> Lithuanian kindergarten, nanny, and childcare directory

ManoVaikai.lt is a comprehensive directory of childcare services in Lithuania including kindergartens (darželiai), nannies (auklės), activity clubs (būreliai), and child specialists.

## API
- Search: GET /api/search/suggestions?q={query} — returns matching entities
- Kindergartens: GET /api/kindergartens?city={city}&limit={n}

## Coverage
- 465+ kindergartens across Lithuania
- Cities: Vilnius, Kaunas, Klaipėda, Šiauliai, Panevėžys, and more
- Types: valstybinis (public), privatus (private)
- Languages: Lithuanian, Polish, Russian, English
